listing.title: Former Dollar Store
listing.address: 3126 Avenue of the Cities, Moline, Rock Island County, IL 61265

description: For registration requirements and regulations, please review here or contact Alex Orth | 949.500.9409 | jorth@crexi.​com.​ 3126 Avenue of the Cities at 3126 Avenue of the Cities, Moline, IL 61265 offers a prime owner-user or investment opportunity in a highly visible corridor location.​ Positioned at the southwest corner of Avenue of the Cities and 31st Street A, this 8,219 SF retail/commercial building features an open floor plan that can easily accommodate a variety of retail, showroom, service, or specialty commercial uses.​ Surrounded by a densely populated neighborhood and benefiting from strong daily traffic counts of approximately 18,300 vehicles per day, the property delivers excellent exposure and convenient customer access.​ Large storefront windows enhance street presence, while parking to the east adds everyday functionality for customers and staff.​ Its prominent corner positioning along a well-traveled thoroughfare places the property near established residential areas and offers quick connectivity to the greater Moline market.​ With 2024 property taxes at $8,445.08, this is a compelling opportunity to acquire a well-located commercial asset with strong visibility, flexible layout, and built-in neighborhood demand! ​ Non-Contingent ​ Earnest Money Deposit is Greater of $20,000 or 10% of the Purchase Price ​ Marketing Fee: 5% of the Winning Bid Amount, $20,000 minimum ​ $10,000 Participation Deposit 3126 Avenue of the Cities, Moline, IL 61265
investment_highlights: ​2024 Property Taxes: $8,445.08 ​Located At Southwest Corner Of Ave Of The Cities & 31st St A ​Open Floor Plan ​Parking To The East ​Densely Populated Neighborhood ​18,300 VPD
